_comment: Re-run of xid-kimi-cross-llm using the moonshot/ direct API (kimi-k2.5-direct alias) instead of openrouter/moonshotai/kimi-k2.5. Same model and config grid; the only difference is the routing, which enables Moonshot's automatic context caching (cached prefix billed at ~25% of base input price). Requires MOONSHOT_API_KEY env var. Use this to compare $/question against the OpenRouter baseline.
